title: limodorum boreale
intro: Limodorum boreale, also known as the Northern green orchid or green adder's mouth, is a species of orchid native to northern parts of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Limodorum boreale include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
